business.name: LD Nails & Spa
business.location_note: Mountainview Plaza, conveniently located next to BMO

hero.headline: LD Nails & Spa
hero.body: Experience exceptional nail care in a clean, relaxing environment in West Kelowna, BC.
hero.gallery_section_body: From classic elegance to bold custom creations, see what we can do for you
hero.cta_section_body: Book your appointment today or walk in anytime. We're here to make you look and feel amazing.

featured_services.title: Artificial Nails
featured_services.description: Liquid gel, pink & white, ombré designs

about.hero_subtext: Professional nail care serving West Kelowna since 2018
body_paragraphs: LD Nails & Spa has been serving West Kelowna since 2018 with professional nail care that's personalized to every client. Our skilled team delivers results you'll love, in a clean and relaxing environment.
From the moment you walk in, you'll notice the difference — attentive staff, premium products, and a commitment to making your experience exceptional.
features: Custom designs for your unique style

values.title: Client-Focused Care
values.description: We treat every client with personalized attention and care, ensuring you get exactly what you want.

values.title: Professional Excellence
values.description: Our skilled technicians stay current with the latest techniques and trends in nail care.

values.title: Community Connection
values.description: Since 2018, we've been proud to serve the West Kelowna community with dedication and passion.

about.visit_body: You'll find us in Mountainview Plaza, conveniently located next to BMO. We warmly welcome both walk-ins and appointments, and our dedicated team is ready to provide you with an exceptional nail care experience.

services.title: Artificial Nails
services.description: Beautiful artificial nail enhancements including liquid gel, pink & white, ombré, and solar nails.

services.title: Nail Care
services.description: Professional manicure and pedicure services with regular polish, shellac, and French styles.

services.title: Kids Services
services.description: Special services for kids including manicures, pedicures, and polish.

services.title: Waxing - Face
services.description: Professional facial waxing services for smooth, hair-free skin.

services.title: Waxing - Body
services.description: Complete body waxing services using gentle products for long-lasting smoothness.

services.title: Spa & Extras
services.description: Indulge in our spa services and special treatments for the ultimate relaxation experience.

pricing.intro: Affordable luxury for all your nail care needs. Prices may vary based on design complexity and technician expertise.

gallery.headline: Our Work
gallery.body: Explore our gallery of stunning nail designs and see why our clients love LD Nails & Spa. From classic elegance to bold custom creations, we bring your vision to life.
gallery.cta_body: Book your appointment today and let our talented team create beautiful nails just for you. Bring your inspiration or let us design something unique!
gallery.follow_body: See more of our work and stay updated with our latest designs

reviews.text: Amazing experience. So friendly and accommodating. Won't go anywhere else now!
reviews.author: Sarah M.

reviews.text: Has to be one of the best nail salons in Kelowna & Westbank! Very professional & attentive!
reviews.author: Jennifer L.

reviews.text: Have been coming here for years. Best service ever. My nails always look great and I get tons of compliments on them. Super grateful to have found a place that understands how picky I can be! Thanks.
reviews.author: Michelle K.

contact.headline: Contact & Book
contact.intro: Ready for beautiful nails? Book your appointment or walk in anytime. We're here to make you look and feel amazing!
contact.form_success: Thank you! We'll contact you soon to confirm your appointment.
contact.gift_cards_note: Gift cards available for purchase in-person only
